name: Cencora, Inc.
description: Cencora, Inc., formerly AmerisourceBergen Corporation, is a leading global pharmaceutical solutions organization centered on improving lives. The company distributes brand-name and generic pharmaceuticals, specialty pharmaceutical products, over-the-counter healthcare products, and home healthcare equipment and supplies to healthcare providers, including acute care hospitals and health systems, independent and chain retail pharmacies, mail-order pharmacies, medical clinics, long-term care and other alternate site pharmacies, and other providers. Cencora also provides logistics, consulting, and other services to pharmaceutical manufacturers.
